'''tadanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyantraniliprole|cyantraniliprole]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-d-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyantraniliprole|cyantraniliprole]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tadanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædængæth|tædængæth]] || [[word:tædængæj|tædængæj]] || [[word:tædængæsh|tædængæsh]] || [[word:tædængæ|tædængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadadangath|tadadangath]] || [[word:tadadangaj|tadadangaj]] || [[word:tadadangash|tadadangash]] || [[word:tadadanga|tadadanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadangath|tadangath]] || [[word:tadangaj|tadangaj]] || [[word:tadangash|tadangash]] || [[word:tadanga|tadanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadafngath|tadafngath]] || [[word:tadafngaj|tadafngaj]] || [[word:tadafngash|tadafngash]] || [[word:tadafngaf|tadafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadangatha|tadangatha]] || [[word:tadangaja|tadangaja]] || [[word:tadangasha|tadangasha]] || [[word:tadangaka|tadangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadangath|tadangath]] || [[word:tadangaj|tadangaj]] || [[word:tadangash|tadangash]] || [[word:tadanga|tadanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadangathal|tadangathal]] || [[word:tadangajal|tadangajal]] || [[word:tadangashal|tadangashal]] || [[word:tadangakal|tadangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadangathatha|tadangathatha]] || [[word:tadangajaja|tadangajaja]] || [[word:tadangashasha|tadangashasha]] || [[word:tadangaka|tadangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadangathan|tadangathan]] || [[word:tadangajan|tadangajan]] || [[word:tadangashan|tadangashan]] || [[word:tadangakan|tadangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadangathaoro|tadangathaoro]] || [[word:tadangajaoro|tadangajaoro]] || [[word:tadangashaoro|tadangashaoro]] || [[word:tadangakaoro|tadangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
